section_miscategorizations.text: I am also referring the patient to an ENT specialist to evaluate the recurrent strep infections and consider a tonsillectomy.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The action (referral) belongs in the Plan, but the note introduces a new problem (recurrent strep infections/tonsillectomy) that is not mentioned or synthesized in the Assessment. This creates a mismatch between Assessment and Plan that could mislead a reader about the scope of assessed problems. The recurrent strep/tonsillectomy issue should also be reflected in the Assessment section.
